---
title: "Scores"
author: "Sujashree Roy"
date: "2026-05-27"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
# =========================
# LOAD LIBRARIES
# =========================

library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(fmsb)

# =========================
# LOAD DATA
# =========================

df <- read_excel("~/Desktop/Company Analysis Kolkata/Kolkata Scores.xlsx")

# View data
head(df)

library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(fmsb)

# -------------------------
# DEFINE SCORE COLUMNS
# -------------------------

score_cols <- c(
  "App Dev",
  "Web Dev",
  "Digital Marketing",
  "Digital Transformation",
  "SEO",
  "Client Strength",
  "Experience"
)

# -------------------------
# CALCULATE TOTAL SCORE
# -------------------------

df$TotalScore <- rowMeans(df[, score_cols])

# -------------------------
# TOP 3 COMPETITORS
# -------------------------

top3 <- df %>%
  arrange(desc(TotalScore)) %>%
  slice(1:3)

print(top3[, c("Company", "TotalScore")])

# -------------------------
# EBLUESOFT SCORES
# -------------------------

ebluesoft = df[14,]

# -------------------------
# CREATE RADAR DATA
# -------------------------

radar_data <- rbind(

  # MAX VALUES
  c(5,5,5,5,5,5,5),

  # MIN VALUES
  c(0,0,0,0,0,0,0),

  # Top 3 competitors
  top3[, c(
    "App Dev",
    "Web Dev",
    "Digital Marketing",
    "Digital Transformation",
    "SEO",
    "Client Strength",
    "Experience"
  )],

  # eBluesoft
  df[14, c(
    "App Dev",
    "Web Dev",
    "Digital Marketing",
    "Digital Transformation",
    "SEO",
    "Client Strength",
    "Experience"
  )]
)

# Convert to dataframe
radar_data <- as.data.frame(radar_data)

# Set row names
rownames(radar_data) <- c(
  "Max",
  "Min",
  top3$Company,
  "eBluesoft"
)

# -------------------------
# RADAR CHART
# -------------------------

radarchart(
  radar_data,

  axistype = 1,

  pcol = c("red", "blue", "lightgreen", "black"),

  pfcol = c(
    rgb(1,0,0,0.2),
    rgb(0,0,1,0.2),
    rgb(0,1,0,0.2),
    rgb(0,0,0,0.2)
  ),

  plwd = 2,
  plty = 1,

  cglcol = "grey",
  cglty = 1,
  axislabcol = "black",

  caxislabels = seq(0,5,1),

  vlcex = 0.9,

  title = "Top 3 Competitors vs eBluesoft"
)

# -------------------------
# LEGEND
# -------------------------

legend(
  "topleft",

  legend = c(top3$Company, "eBluesoft"),

  col = c("red", "blue", "lightgreen", "black"),

  lty = 1,
  lwd = 2,
  bty = "n"
)
```
